creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jesús,

Thanks for the patch. There seems to be a problem fetching one of the creates though:

=> rust/crates/zstd-safe-6.0.3+zstd.1.5.2.crate doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://crates.io/api/v1/crates/zstd-safe/6.0.3+zstd.1.5.2/download?dummy=/rust/crates/zstd-safe-6.0.3+zstd.1.5.2.crate
fetch: https://crates.io/api/v1/crates/zstd-safe/6.0.3+zstd.1.5.2/download?dummy=/rust/crates/zstd-safe-6.0.3+zstd.1.5.2.crate: Authentication error
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/rust/crates/zstd-safe-6.0.3+zstd.1.5.2.crate
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/rust/crates/zstd-safe-6.0.3+zstd.1.5.2.crate: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1


Would you have a look?
